CREATE TABLE aBook (name String, mail Nullable(String), phone Nullable(String), telegram Nullable(String));
INSERT INTO aBook VALUES ('Alice', 'alice@example.com', NULL, NULL), ('Bob', NULL, '123-456-7890', NULL), ('Charlie', NULL, NULL, 'charlie_telegram');
SELECT name, coalesce(mail, phone, CAST(telegram,'Nullable(String)')) FROM aBook;
SELECT name, coalesce(mail, coalesce(phone, CAST(telegram,'Nullable(String)'))) FROM aBook;
SELECT name, coalesce(NULL, NULL, NULL) AS ContactInfo FROM aBook;
SELECT name, coalesce(CAST(NULL AS Nullable(String)), CAST(NULL AS Nullable(String)), CAST(NULL AS Nullable(String))) AS ContactInfo FROM aBook;
CREATE TABLE Contacts (id Int32, user_id Int32, mail Nullable(String), phone Nullable(String), telegram Nullable(String));
INSERT INTO Contacts VALUES (1, 1, 'alice@example.com', NULL, NULL), (2, 2, NULL, '123-456-7890', NULL), (3, 3, NULL, NULL, 'charlie_telegram');
SELECT a.name, coalesce(c.mail, c.phone, CAST(c.telegram,'Nullable(String)')) FROM aBook a LEFT JOIN Contacts c ON a.name = c.user_id;
SELECT name, coalesce(NULLIF(mail, ''), phone, CAST(telegram,'Nullable(String)')) FROM aBook;
SELECT t1.name, coalesce(t2.mail, coalesce(t2.phone, CAST(t2.telegram, 'Nullable(String)'))) AS ContactInfo FROM aBook t1 JOIN Contacts t2 ON t1.name = CAST(t2.user_id AS String);
SELECT name, coalesce(ss.mail, ss.phone, CAST(ss.telegram, 'Nullable(String)')) AS ContactInfo FROM (SELECT name, mail, phone, telegram FROM aBook WHERE name IS NOT NULL) ss;
SELECT name, coalesce(mail, phone, CAST(telegram,'Nullable(String)'), 'No contact information') AS ContactInfo FROM aBook;
SELECT DISTINCT coalesce(mail, phone, CAST(telegram,'Nullable(String)')) FROM aBook WHERE name = 'Alice';
WITH (SELECT coalesce(NULL, 'default@example.com') AS tmp_mail) AS tmp SELECT name, coalesce(tmp_mail, phone, CAST(telegram, 'Nullable(String)')) FROM aBook;
